title: Surveystones
description:
Adds waystones to surveyor maps like Antique Atlas 4 and Hoofprint.
Supports Blaystones and Fwaystones.
body:
Adds Surveyor landmarks for waystones, and adds Antique Atlas marker textures for them.
Works with Fwaystones, Blaystones, and Surveyor maps (Antique Atlas 4, Hoofprint)
Requires Connector and FFAPI on (neo)forge
### Afterword All mods are built on the work of many others. Credit to [Antique Waystones](https://modrinth.com/mod/antique-waystones) for the blaystones marker texture, and [Way2Way](https://modrinth.com/mod/way2wayfabric) for insights wrangling the API. The [surveyor ecosystem](https://modrinth.com/collection/fUFr3Mvj) is trying to make mapping more accessible! (and open-source)
Feel free to contribute improvements to [surveyor](https://github.com/sisby-folk/surveyor), or utilize it for your own mods!
